title: WorkspaceScope
description: A bounded workspace, project, folder, repository, organization, fog workspace, or sandbox selected for a SourceOS/SociOS agent session. Captures read/write/index/execution boundaries before capabilities or connectors are activated.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.1.0".

workspaceKind.description: The workspace class selected during onboarding or session setup.

displayName.description: Human-readable workspace label shown in the shell UI.

rootRef.description: Opaque path, URI, URN, repository, or workspace reference. Local UIs may redact this when serialized externally.

mountMode.description: How the workspace is exposed to the agent runtime.

allowedReadRefs.description: Paths, globs, URNs, or refs the agent may read. Empty means no read access unless mountMode semantics say otherwise.

allowedWriteRefs.description: Paths, globs, URNs, or refs the agent may write. Empty means no direct workspace writes.

excludedRefs.description: Refs that remain blocked regardless of broader read/write grants, such as secrets, build outputs, and dependency caches.

indexingPolicy.description: Whether workspace content may be indexed and whether any index may persist beyond the session.

secretScanPolicy.description: Secret-scanning gate required before indexing, writes, or execution.

artifactRootRef.description: Output directory, artifact vault ref, or content-addressed root for generated reports and receipts.

connectorRefs.description: Connectors bound to this workspace scope.

policyDecisionRefs.description: Policy decisions that authorized or denied the workspace boundary.
